# Moughamir Portfolio

Personal portfolio and blog of a Senior Full-Stack Engineer focused on AI, Agentic workflows, and modern web architecture.

## Core Expertise
- AI Agents & LLM Orchestration (MCP, LangChain)
- Web Performance & Modern Tooling (Astro, Bun, Rust)
- Technical Architecture & Knowledge Management (RAG, CAG)

## Important Links
- [Main Site](https://moughamir.github.io/)
- [Blog](https://moughamir.github.io/blog/)
- [Work](https://moughamir.github.io/work/)

## Technical Persona
Minimalist, performance-oriented, security-conscious. High technical authority in full-stack ecosystems.
